---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for logmon
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What problem would this solve? What are you trying to do?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Design-invariant check**
Does this interact with any of the load-bearing invariants (no `wevtutil sl`;
two-files-one-writer; one retention term per archive; one-shot baseline;
flag every unexplained clear; append-only alerts; UTC)? If so, how?

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches.

**Additional context**
Anything else.
